title: koeleria cristata var. grandiflora
intro: Koeleria cristata var. grandiflora, also known as Tall June-grass or Big Flower June-grass, is a perennial grass native to temperate regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata var. grandiflora include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
